description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a predominantly flat roof and a mix of black, white, and gray exterior surfaces. The structure includes two visible stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the house has a spacious driveway and a small lawn area, separated by a low fence and a sidewalk. The rear and side yards are enclosed, with green spaces and paved walkways visible. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, asymmetrical windows, and a sleek black, white, and gray exterior. Features include a driveway, fenced yard, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, lawn, and prominent flat roof with geometric lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped profile, upper story setback, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying fenced backyard, green space, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible yard, fence, and asymmetrical window placement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door integrated into the facade, adjacent to a driveway and low fence.
